lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Well [player name], now that you are a White Knight, I expect you should be out there hunting Black Knights for us!

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Sadly we are not as rich as we once were, and there are many White Knights who foolishly lose their combat equipment.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: We do not think it fair to make a profit from our brethren, so we will sell you equipment at cost, and rebuy it at the same cost, but we will only sell equipment to those we consider responsible enough to

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: By killing Black Knights, you will increase your reputation with us, by killing White Knights we will obviously think less of you.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: You can check your White Knight reputation level by looking at your quest journal for the Wanted! Quest, or Sir Vyvin will let you know what level you are at when you go to purchase equipment.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Sir Vyvin can be found in Falador Castle, and he will sell you any equipment appropriate to your reputation level.

lines.speaker: Sir Amik Varze
lines.text: Have fun, and go kill some Black Knights for me!
